title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Quest Alliance - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Quest Alliance - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Join the Quest Alliance family as a Curriculum Developer in Delhi. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Quest Alliance:
Quest Alliance is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Flexible working hours
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Delhi, Delhi, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Quest Alliance!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
